title: how can i get notification when automation is disabled?
excerpt:
Hi, 
Sometimes i get a notification that the automation is disabled for some reason. 
I assume that only the automation owner get the notification, 
Can i add more users to get this notofications/emails?

posts.author: shay.butran (shay butran)
